Index.title: THE POWER OF EXCELLENCE
Index.subtitle: Turkey's leading supplier of hunting and sports ammunition, and firearms since 1955.
Index.brands_subtitle: Brands representing quality and trust, produced at international standards.
Index.jet_desc: The perfect balance between low recoil and maximum speed for Trap and Skeet shooting. Deadly effect even at long distances with a wide choice of calibers.
Index.gold_horse_desc: Produced with Turkey's unique "Cartridge Sealing" technology. Perfect pressure control, delayed opening and maximum impact effect.
Index.miracle_desc: Designed for maximum stopping power and optimized grouping balance. Miraculous results thanks to its special wad structure.
Index.apollo_desc: The indispensable choice of classic hunters for quail hunting, with its special solutions for all terrains and high-level security.
Index.apport_desc: Our competition-oriented APPORT series guarantees the optimum speed and stability required to achieve maximum performance in sport shooting.
Index.idetech_desc: Special production ammunition providing operational superiority at global defense industry (Law Enforcement & Military) standards.
Index.idetech_less_lethal_desc: Stabilised Impact Projectiles & Baton Rounds (Plastic / Rubber Buckshot)
Index.idetech_breach_desc: Door Breaching and tactical entry munitions.
Index.idetech_cs_desc: Tear gas (CS) and tactical calibers for defense purposes (9x19mm etc.)
Index.ceoguns_desc: Highly engineered, reliable and ergonomic 12 gauge hunting and sporting shotguns production line.
Index.contact_subtitle: Find our authorized dealers in Turkey and around the world on the map.
Index.map_desc: When the project goes live, the "Find Your Nearest Dealer" feature will work here with Google Maps / Mapbox integration.
Index.corporate_subtitle: A success story built on excellence and passion since 1955.
Index.about_text: With over half a century of experience, İdeal Av is one of the most trusted names in Turkey's hunting and sporting ammunition sector. From our production headquarters in Adana, we manufacture at international standards (C.I.P), proving our strength in both local and global markets.
Index.mission_text: To provide operational superiority and reliability by producing ammunition at the highest safety and performance standards.
Index.history_text: Starting as a local initiative, we have grown into a global brand that represents Turkish engineering and quality in over 30 countries.
Index.catalog_section_subtitle: Explore our wide range of high-performance products.
Index.prof_tactical_desc: Engineered for ultimate performance in competition and defense.
Index.heritage_classic_desc: Time-honored tradition and unmatched reliability for the classic hunter.
